nasb.text: so that there may be no division in the body, but that the members may have the same care for one another.

esv.text: that there may be no division in the body, but that the members may have the same care for one another.

cnv.text: 好使肢體能夠互相照顧，免得身體上有了分裂。

ccb.text: 这样身体各肢体才可以彼此相顾，不会分门别类。

csbs.text: 免得身体中有分争，好让各部分彼此之间都有同样的关顾。
